summary: Verified Single Leg Tree implementation for mining formula. All 9 backend tests passed (1 skipped - registration disabled). Mining APIs correctly use tree_position for network_size calculation. Direct referrals still use referred_by field (unchanged). Frontend loads correctly.

features_tested.GET /api/mining/status/{uid}: PASS - Returns network_size=0, network_cap=912, mining_rate, total_daily_rate
features_tested.GET /api/mining/rate-breakdown/{uid}: PASS - Shows base_rate=500, network_size, prc_per_user, network_rate
features_tested.GET /api/growth/network-stats/{uid}: PASS - Returns network_size (from tree_position), direct_referrals (from referred_by)

critical_code_review_comments: mining.py get_network_size() correctly uses tree_position to count ACTIVE users below user in single leg tree
growth_economy.py get_network_size() has same implementation using tree_position
auth.py registration correctly assigns tree_position and network_parent to new users
server.py startup migration auto-migrates users without tree_position
Direct referrals still use referred_by field (unchanged) - verified in network stats
Network cap formula correctly uses direct_referrals: min(4000, 800 + 16 × D)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single Leg Tree implementation verified. Mining formula uses tree_position for network_size calculation. Test user at tree_position 3 has network_size=0 (no ACTIVE users below - users need Elite + mining_active). Direct referrals=7 (from referred_by field). Network cap=912 (800 + 16×7). Registration assigns tree_position to new users (tested via code review, registration disabled on preview).

single_leg_tree_explanation.concept: All users arranged in single chain by created_at (joining date)
single_leg_tree_explanation.network_parent: UID of user just above in chain
single_leg_tree_explanation.network_size_calculation: Count ACTIVE users with tree_position > user's position
single_leg_tree_explanation.active_user_criteria: Elite subscription + mining_active + session not expired
